## Eval impact

If you changed `eval/eval_questions.json`, retrieval (`03_search.py`), chunking, or hints/weights, paste **before/after** from:

```powershell
cd industrial-cpp-kb-lab
python src/03_search.py --eval
```

- [ ] I ran eval locally (or CI is green on this branch)
- [ ] I did **not** lower `EVAL_COV5_GATE` or add holdout-specific filename boosts to pass CI
